titleStmt.title: SII 20.61: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 61. (B.K. No. 56 of 1936-37.) KANNOḶḶI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the right wall of Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 19, Bhāva, Chaitra, śu. 1, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1094, March 19, Sunday, f.d.t. ·14.

This badly damaged inscription seems to register a gift of land, garden, and oilmills by Paṭṭamahādēvī Maiḷalamahādēvi, queen of Vikramāditya. She seems to have been administering Kannavaḷḷi while the king was ruling from his capital Kalyāṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷō
kyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanā
śraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire
kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḻu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . svastya
navarataparamakalyāṇābhyudayasahasraphalabhōgabhāgini dvitīyalakṣmīsamāne
kaḷahamsayāne kalikālasarasvati pratyakṣapārvvati parivārasamuddharaṇe
dhātrījanarakṣāmaṇi sāhasavidyādhari sakaḷakaḷāvati śrīmatribhuvanamallavi
śāḷavakṣasthaḷanivāsiniyarappa paṭṭamahādēvi maiḷa
śrīmaccāḷukya vikramavarṣada 19 neya
bhāvasaṁvatsarada caitra suddha 1 Ā maiḻalamahādēviyaru Agra
hāraṁ kaṁnnavaḷḷiyaṁ hipparageya baṭṭeyiṁ baḍaga
ya kōlalu biṭṭa mattaru mattaru . yippatteraḍu . A
ntu sama sarvvanamasya mattaru 100 pūrvvada tōṁṭaveraḍu
gāṇaveraḍu Intī dharmmamanūroḍeyapramukhama
hājanaṁgaḷu svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru [.] kurukṣētra vāraṇā
śiyoḷu sahasrakavileyu brāhmaṇaranaḷida mahāpātaka
makku kavileya suva
rṇna pāragarappa brāhmaṇargge koṭṭa
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 20.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
